custom_css_rules: /* Custom Card Styling for Dashboard Tools */
.tool-card { background: var(--secondary-background-color); border: 1px solid #1E293B; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; transition: all 0.2s ease; cursor: pointer; }
.tool-card h3 { color: #D4AF37; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-size: 1.1rem; }

.stButton > button { background-color: #D4AF37 !important; color: #0A0F0C !important; font-weight: 700 !important; border-radius: 8px !important; border: none !important; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem !important; transition: all 0.2s ease !important; }
.stButton.outline > button { background-color: transparent !important; color: #D4AF37 !important; border: 1px solid #D4AF37 !important; }

.hero-bg { background-image: url('https://static.prod-images.emergentagent.com/jobs/1f319174-0731-41d0-983f-a0648c81caff/images/287fc11f678f488b835af1a4bf54d25ae735822fce690c1bd3211fd0c8a50f19.png'); background-size: cover; background-position: center; padding: 4rem 2rem; border-radius: 16px; margin-bottom: 2rem; position: relative; }
.hero-bg::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(10, 15, 12, 0.7); border-radius: 16px; }

layout_patterns.landing_page: Use a prominent hero section utilizing the 'hero-bg' CSS class via st.markdown. Display the value proposition clearly using Manrope headings. Include a centered primary 'Sign in with Google' action. The background should be abstract dark green/gold to establish the sports analytics mood.
layout_patterns.paywall_screen: A clean, focused single-column layout. Use a card-like container (via st.container or custom HTML) to explain the $9.99/month benefits. Place the Stripe Checkout button prominently at the bottom.
layout_patterns.dashboard_home: Grid layout using st.columns (e.g., 2 or 3 columns). Render 'tool-card' HTML elements for each betting system (NBA, MLB, Seasonal Tools) that wrap a st.button or st.page_link for navigation.
layout_patterns.individual_tools: Standard two-pane layout: use st.sidebar for filters, dates, and parameters. The main content area should contain the data visualizations, tables (Tango Tracker, Slump Detector), and st.metrics at the top for quick stats.
layout_patterns.user_account: Place a user profile section either in the st.sidebar or top-right using st.popover (if Streamlit version allows) or simple columns. Include user avatar, email, subscription status, and a logout button.

images.description: Abstract dark green and gold geometric background for sports analytics dashboard, professional, sleek

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the 'custom_css_rules' early in your Streamlit app using st.markdown('<style>...<style>', unsafe_allow_html=True).

Configure Streamlit's base theme in .streamlit/config.toml using the values in 'streamlit_config_toml'. Default to dark mode for the premium sports analytics feel, as users usually prefer dark mode for tools.
Implement Google Sign-In as requested. If unauthenticated, show the landing page.
Implement Stripe Checkout for the single tier subscription. If authenticated but not subscribed, show the paywall screen.

For the dashboard grid, instead of native st.buttons which are hard to style as cards, you can use st.markdown with raw HTML/CSS (class 'tool-card') and handle clicks via st_components or standard st.page_link.
Ensure all HTML elements you inject have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-form-submit-button') for robust testing.
Maintain the dark green (#0D2C1A or #0A0F0C) and gold (#D4AF37) color scheme across all custom components and charts.
